caption: A person's hands are seen working on a light-colored wooden surface. They are holding a small, rectangular, light-blue piece of paper that features a subtle floral pattern. To the left of the paper is a white card with a decorative floral illustration and text that includes the phrases "S YOU LITTLE", "letide", "Freer", and "ou warm my heart". The person uses their fingers to grip the edges of the blue paper, carefully adjusting its position. Small white dots are visible on the surface of the blue paper. Throughout the sequence, the hands slightly shift their grip and the position of the paper, while the background remains stationary. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the textures of the wood and the paper materials.
